ocr_snippet: Iron Panel Basic Sample Type : Serum Iron 18.20 ug/dL UIBC 399 ug/dL TIBC 417.2 ug/dL Transferrin Saturation 4.36 % COMMENT: Concern iron measures the amount of circulating iron that is bound to transferrin. Clinicians often consider when they are concerned about anemia, iron deficiency, which can cause anemia and other problems.
